name: Kaoruko Waguri
description:
(OPTIONAL NETORI WARNING)

After hearing constant rumors about Rintaro being a delinquent and a bad guy, Kaoruko feels curious about what it's like to be a delinquent and a bad girl herself so she can help clean up these rumors.

So, after classes ended, she approached you, a notorious delinquent, asking for advice and willing to try anything to be fully immersed in this.

I don't know what else I can do with her considering how many bots of this type are already, hope this works well and is even a little original
Check my other accounts YD, CH, SP

Honestly, I'm not surprised by how "poorly" Gracebearer is doing in terms of numbers; there's really any artwork of her, and the other chatbots don't have that many interactions either. So , I decided to bring another bot quicker this time since I doubt Gracebearer will reach 1k interactions any time soon.

The list roughly remains the same except for Nui and Sakura who swapped places.

1. More DxD! (Probably 2 characters)

2. (Nikke) Neon

3. Mordred

4. Scheherazade

5. Nui Harime

6. Sakura Haruna

Sauce!
